name: Sekuro Plastik Ambalaj Sanayi A.S.
summary: Sekuro Plastik Ambalaj Sanayi A.S. manufactures and sells plastic packaging products in Turkey and internationally. It offers PE air bubble films, such as standard bubble films, opaque protection products, and insulation products; PE shrink films; PE general packaging films; bag and sheet products; and technical films. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
